mapper.select: SELECT m.member_number AS memberNumber, m.member_name AS memberName, m.member_nickname AS memberNickname, s.grad_school AS gradSchool, s.grad_depart AS gradDepart, f.file_name AS fileName, TO_CHAR(mt.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createdAt FROM UB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTOR s ON m.survey_number = s.survey_number LEFT JOIN UB_FILE f ON m.file_number = f.file_number LEFT JOIN UB_MENTORING mt ON m.member_number = mt.mentor_number WHERE m.member_type = 'MENTOR' AND m.member_state = '계정 활성화' ORDER BY m.member_number DESC

SELECT m.member_number AS memberNumber, m.member_name AS memberName, m.member_nickname AS memberNickname, s.grad_school AS gradSchool, s.grad_depart AS gradDepart, f.file_name AS fileName, TO_CHAR(mt.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS createdAt FROM UB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN UB_SURVEY_MENTOR s ON m.survey_number = s.survey_number LEFT JOIN UB_FILE f ON m.file_number = f.file_number LEFT JOIN UB_MENTORING mt ON m.member_number = mt.mentor_number WHERE m.member_number = #{memberNumber}
